name: bradys-marketplace
description: B's personal Claude Code plugin marketplace.

plugins.name: mem0-brady
plugins.description: B's personal self-hosted Mem0 backbone — the single memory store shared by Claude Code and Hal. Does BOTH explicit hard facts (mcp__mem0__* tools) and passive auto-capture/recall (SessionStart/UserPromptSubmit/Read/Stop/PreCompact hooks), partitioned by app_id (evergreen / general / hal-ops). Bundles the grill-me skill (Mem0-backed plan/design interview). Native local Qdrant (no Docker) behind a launchd MCP server. Run /mem0-brady:setup once.

plugins.name: slack-bridge
plugins.description: Bridge to Slack's web API via browser session tokens (xoxc/xoxd) — surfaces what the hosted Slack MCP can't: true unread (Activity feed) with real bulk mark-read, and the saved-for-later 'Later' list (list/complete/snooze/archive). Skills: /slack-triage (interactive unread board), /slack-saved (grounded, stateful followup worklist with a durable decision store), /slack-unwrapped (stats recap), plus /slack-setup and /slack-doctor. Bundles a custom Python MCP server (13 tools) + a Chrome token-grabber extension. Run /slack-setup once.
